evals.name: Change agent instructions
evals.prompt: Use the edit-agent skill to change the agent's instructions to: 'You are a customer support agent for Contoso Electronics. Be friendly, concise, and always offer to escalate to a human agent if the customer is frustrated.'

evals.name: Update display name and conversation starters
evals.prompt: Use the edit-agent skill to change the agent's display name to 'Contoso Support Bot' and update the conversation starters to: 'Track my order', 'Return a product', and 'Speak to an agent'.

evals.name: Enable generative actions in settings
evals.prompt: Use the edit-agent skill to enable generative actions on the agent (set GenerativeActionsEnabled to true in settings.mcs.yml).
